metadata.description: Swiss Cheese model tooling for agentic coding — stack imperfect defense layers (lint, hooks, tests, multi-agent review, docs/ADR discipline, human review) so their holes never align.

plugins.name: swiss-cheese
plugins.description: Layered defense (Swiss Cheese model) for agentic coding: initialize defense layers in any repo, token-frugal multi-agent code review from a single shared diff, autonomous quality loop, custom layer wizard, docs/ADR audit, and task knowledge-source discovery (Jira, Redmine, MCP).
